---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Short description of the feature or enhancement.

## Motivation

Why would this be useful? (e.g. user need, policy question, consistency with another page.)

## Proposed behaviour

What you’d like to see (e.g. new page, new filter, new chart type).

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about.

## Additional context

Links to ADRs, designs, or related issues if relevant.
